# Code Analyzer
> World-class layered code intelligence platform. Understand, search, and review code at unprecedented depth. MCP server for AI agents, VS Code extension, and CLI. TypeScript/Node.js monorepo, 10 packages under @code-analyzer scope. MIT license.

## Quick Facts
- Language: TypeScript 5.6+ (strict mode)
- Runtime: Node.js >= 20
- Architecture: 7-layer strict separation
- Knowledge Graph: 33 entity types, 39 relationship types
- Pipeline: 18-phase DAG with Kahn's topological sort
- Languages: 8 fully supported (TS, JS, Python, Go, Java, Kotlin, C#, Rust) + 10 basic
- Search: Hybrid BM25 + vector with Reciprocal Rank Fusion
- Review: Plan → Analyze → Filter → Relocate pipeline
- MCP: 38 tools, 15 resources, 5 prompts
- Standards: 10 built-in templates + custom
- Packages: shared, core, infra, analyzer, intelligence, mcp, server, cli, vscode, web
- License: MIT

## Install
```bash
npm install -g @code-analyzer/cli
code-analyzer analyze ./my-project
code-analyzer search "authentication" --repo ./my-project
```

## MCP Setup
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "code-analyzer": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@code-analyzer/mcp"],
      "env": { "CODE_ANALYZER_PROJECT_DIR": "/path/to/project" }
    }
  }
}
```

## Programmatic Usage
```typescript
import { createAnalyzer } from '@code-analyzer/analyzer';
const analyzer = createAnalyzer({ projectDir: './my-project' });
await analyzer.index();
const results = await analyzer.search({ query: 'auth middleware', semantic: true });
const impact = await analyzer.analyzeImpact({ file: 'src/auth/login.ts', symbol: 'authenticateUser' });
```

## Key Features
- Multi-language unified knowledge graph (33 entity types × 39 relationship types)
- Call graph tracing with configurable depth
- Hybrid BM25 + vector semantic search
- Automated code review with Plan/Analyze/Filter/Relocate pipeline
- Impact analysis with BFS-based blast radius computation
- 10 built-in coding standards + custom standards engine
- Cypher graph query language support
- Cross-repository federation with contracts
- MCP server with 38 tools for AI agents
- VS Code extension with Copilot Chat integration
- CLI for scripting and CI/CD
- Worker pool with circuit breaker and retry
- Incremental indexing (<500ms per file change)
- Transaction support with snapshot-based rollback
- 95%+ test coverage
